listitem.para:
levels = 1
LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHAKE_M32_H5
OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHAKE_N32_W2

levels = 2
LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHA256_M32_H5
OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHA256_N32_W2

briefdescription.para: levels = 2 LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHA256_M32_H5 OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHA256_N32_W2
levels = 1 LMS type = XSECURE_LMS_SHAKE_M32_H5 OTS type = XSECURE_LMS_OTS_SHAKE_N32_W2
This function performs KAT on HMAC (SHA3-384).
This function performs private decrypt KAT on RSA core.

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR Error when RSA data not matched with expected data
XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR - Error when RSA data not matched with expected data
XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR Error when RSA data not matched with expected data.
XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR Error when RSA data not matched with expected data.
XSECURE_RSA_KAT_DECRYPT_DATA_MISMATCH_ERROR Error when RSA data not matched with expected data
Validate the decrypted data with the expected data provided
Validate the decrypted data with the expected data provided

briefdescription.para: This function performs known answer test(KAT) on SHA-2 crypto engine.
This function performs known answer test(KAT) on SHAKE crypto engine.
This function performs KAT on HSS SHA2 256.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If HSS SHA2 256 KAT is passed.
XST_SUCCESS If HSS SHA2 256 KAT is passed.

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT on HSS SHAKE 256.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If HSS SHAKE256 KAT is passed.
XST_SUCCESS If HSS SHAKE256 KAT is passed.

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT on LMS - SHA2 256.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If LMS SHA2 256 KAT is passed.
XST_SUCCESS If LMS SHA2 256 KAT is passed.

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT on LMS SHAKE 256.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If LMS SHAKE256 KAT is passed.
XST_SUCCESS If LMS SHAKE256 KAT is passed.

briefdescription.para: This file contains known answer tests for Versal_2Ve_2Vm.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.4 kal 07/24/2024 Initial release kal 01/30/2025 Update KAT vectors for SHA2-256 and SHAKE for LMS 5.6 tvp 10/01/2025 Remove XSecure_Sha384Kat and use sha_pmxc instead of using softsha2
